codeReview.summary: The final report fully satisfies all validation assertions. It explicitly declares gem as the winner with comprehensive quantitative (8.2/10 vs 7.8/10) and qualitative justification, includes a detailed 6-step Fix-and-Merge action plan with time estimates, maintains consistency across all analysis sections, and provides complete traceability with specific file/line references.

VAL-REC-001.assertion: Ganador declarado - El informe declara explícitamente cuál rama es 'mejor' con justificación cuantitativa y cualitativa

evidence.explicitDeclaration: Executive Summary: 'Ganador Recomendado: gem con fixes previos (Fix-and-Merge)' and Section 6: '🏆 Ganador: gem (con fixes previos)'
evidence.quantitativeJustification: Puntaje Total: gem 8.2/10 vs main 7.8/10 with breakdown: Funcionalidad +2.5, Tests +2.5, Docs +1.5, Code -0.3
evidence.qualitativeJustification: TOON critical for LLMs (~40% token savings), Auto-retry/Auto-paginación simplify API consumption, 32 test functions for TOON, documentation optimized for agents with 'Agent Action' exit codes

VAL-REC-002.assertion: Plan de acción propuesto - El informe incluye plan de acción específico: merge, fix-and-merge, o hybrid approach

steps: Mover Known Gotchas de main (SUGERIDO) - 20 min
evidence.specificity: Each step includes target file, code snippets for fixes, and concrete actions

VAL-CROSS-001.assertion: Coherencia de análisis - Las conclusiones del informe son consistentes entre secciones

evidence.codeQualityWinner: main (8.1 vs 7.8) - consistent with bugs in gem
evidence.functionalityWinner: gem (8.5 vs 6.0) - consistent with 7 new features
evidence.documentationWinner: gem (9.0 vs 7.5) - consistent with LLM optimization
evidence.overallWinner: gem (8.2 vs 7.8) - weighted average matches individual scores
evidence.recommendationConsistency: Fix-and-Merge recommendation is consistent with finding 2 critical bugs that must be fixed before merge

VAL-CROSS-002.assertion: Trazabilidad - Cada conclusión del informe está respaldada por evidencia específica

bugsCited: pkg/confluence/export.go:205 - Mutex bug with code snippet
pkg/protheus/query.go:44-58 - SQL validation regression with code snippet
evidence.dedicatedTraceabilitySection: Evidencia de Trazabilidad section at end of report consolidates all references

summary: The final-report feature passes all validation assertions. The report explicitly declares gem as the winner with comprehensive quantitative (8.2/10 vs 7.8/10) and qualitative justification, provides a detailed 6-step Fix-and-Merge action plan with time estimates, maintains full consistency across all analysis sections, and includes complete traceability with specific file/line references for all conclusions. The worker correctly followed the analysis-worker skill procedure, synthesizing all 4 prior analysis reports (code-quality, functionality, tests, docs) into a coherent final recommendation.
